net.croz.nrich.validation.api.constraint

Annotation Type MaxSizeInBytes


  • @Target(value={METHOD,FIELD,ANNOTATION_TYPE,CONSTRUCTOR,PARAMETER,TYPE_USE})
 @Retention(value=RUNTIME)
 @Repeatable(value=MaxSizeInBytes.List.class)
 @Documented
 @Constraint(validatedBy={})
public @interface MaxSizeInBytes
    The annotated element size in bytes must be less than specified maximum.

    • Required Element Summary

      Required Elements 
      Modifier and Type Required Element and Description
      int value
      Maximum number of allowed bytes.

    • Optional Element Summary

      Optional Elements 
      Modifier and Type Optional Element and Description
      java.lang.String encoding
      Encoding used when resolving number bytes from string.
      java.lang.Class<?>[] groups 
      java.lang.String message 
      java.lang.Class<? extends javax.validation.Payload>[] payload 

    • Element Detail

      • value

        public abstract int value
        Maximum number of allowed bytes.
        Returns:
        maximum number of allowed bytes

      • message

        public abstract java.lang.String message
        Default:
        "{nrich.constraint.maxSizeInBytes.invalid.message}"

      • groups

        public abstract java.lang.Class<?>[] groups
        Default:
        {}

      • encoding

        public abstract java.lang.String encoding
        Encoding used when resolving number bytes from string.
        Returns:
        encoding
        Default:
        "UTF-8"

      • payload

        public abstract java.lang.Class<? extends javax.validation.Payload>[] payload
        Default:
        {}
